text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the academy's annual summer training camp, and Air Groove has
been spending the bulk of her training time running on the beach.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Phew. Twenty kilometers already?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't tire out on the sand as easily as I used to. When it comes to
improving stamina and core strength, there's truly no better place
than the beach.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention its utility as an analogue to dirt courses. I'm in better
form than ever—right now, I don't think I could lose to anyone. ...Hm?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dear me. Is it already time for the festival to begin?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, she did mention she would be patrolling the
festival on behalf of the student council tonight.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Students tend to get much too excited at the festival every year.
Someone has to keep an eye on them for their own safety; I should
go.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Very well... as long as you understand that we're going for work and not to fool around.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: If you can promise me that, then sure, come along.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Cotton candy, takoyaki, candied carrots... All these sweets can't
possibly be doing anything positive for the students' training.
choice_data_list: Let me get you a little something!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I seem to recall telling you that we aren't here to fool around. Did the
summer sun fry your brain or something?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Really, what am I supposed to do with you... Hm?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Eek! S-stop that, please!

text_block_list.name: Journalist
text_block_list.text:
I just need a few shots! You're all Tracen students, right? You're
practically guaranteed to be future stars!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A man who appears to be a tabloid writer is is taking photos of
students against their will.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: How impudent...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove looks like she's about to blow a gasket. I step forward to
do something about it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... No, I'll go.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Please keep watch from here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Groove approaches the scene at a determined pace.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. Did you mention that you were a journalist?

text_block_list.name: Journalist
text_block_list.text: Huh? W-wait... You're the Empress... Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure which publication you represent, but our school requires
all reporters to obtain permission before talking to students.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This measure is in place for the protection of students' privacy. I trust
you understand that?

text_block_list.name: Journalist
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... I'm sorry. I'm an Umamusume-centric reporter, you see...

text_block_list.name: Journalist
text_block_list.text:
Racing has been a passion of mine since I was young, and I guess I
kind of lose control when I see the runners I admire up close...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Please do know that we are honored to encounter our fans.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But we would all appreciate if you could adhere to proper etiquette.
Schedule something official, and you won't encounter any problems.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reporter is easily swayed by Air Groove's polite admonishing and
quickly leaves the scene.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I recall Air Groove's falling-out with her previous trainer. Would the
Air Groove from back then have handled this situation so calmly?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: All right, that marks the end of my shift, and everything's in order.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I suppose we could return to the lodge now, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ah... Are those fireworks?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: In that case, come with me. I know a good spot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shrine commands a panoramic night view of the city. Away from
the hustle and bustle of the festival, only the sound of fireworks can
be heard.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Just like flowers, fireworks are the product of much hard work and
attention. No wonder they're a sight to see in full bloom.
choice_data_list:
I bet there'll be fireworks blooming for you one
day.

I bet there'll be fireworks blooming for you one
day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Planting a garden in the sky... It wouldn't be a simple task, but
someday...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wow... They really are beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The reflections from the blooms dazzle in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh, what are you looking at?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey, what's with the sappy expression? Have you no shame?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: The show's finished. Let's head back for real this time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She begins to hasten off, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oof.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The uneven stone surface causes Air Groove to tumble onto the
ground.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph. It'll take more than a silly stumble to...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Actually... Strike that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Will you help me with this shoe?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I pick up her stray high heel and kneel before her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: While you're doing that... answer me one question.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: In your eyes... How do you perceive me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I see. Then I've been cultivating my own bloom effectively.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm still not fully convinced of... what was that? The greenness of your
thumb? ...Well, maybe you'll get there eventually.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Continue to work hard, and perhaps you really can produce a
wonderful crown of flowers for me, just as I will lead you to glory.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But first, could you please put on my shoe?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove emanates an even more beautiful air of regality than when
we first crossed paths.
